message:
lint: add #[must_use] annotations across widget, extras, harness, runtime, and pty crates

- Systematic #[must_use] campaign adding 261 annotations across 51 files
  to enforce explicit handling of return values at API boundaries
- Remove 19 incorrect #[must_use] annotations from functions that return
  unit type or where the annotation was inappropriate (e.g., syntax.rs,
  text_effects.rs)
- Net +242 #[must_use] annotations improving API safety and preventing
  silent value drops

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
